pr.title: Record: Residual Input Mixing + mixed int6 GPTQ + grouped TTT + MLP 3.5x

output.summary: Denser residual-mixed inputs, 3.5x MLP, and grouped AdamW TTT complement mixed int6 GPTQ on the 11L/512 model within the 600s/16MB budget.
techniques: Dense learned mix of current stream, earlier blocks, and x0 per block
Mixed int6 per-row GPTQ with early QAT and EMA
Grouped score-first AdamW TTT separating matrix and control params
